summary: Complete backend and frontend testing of Planilla module. All 10 backend API tests pass. All frontend workflows (view, create, edit, delete) work correctly. Sidebar navigation to /planilla works. Summary cards, filters, and detail tables all functional.

backend_api.GET /api/planillas?empresa_id=7: PASSED - Returns list of planillas with detail lines
backend_api.POST /api/planillas?empresa_id=7: PASSED - Creates planilla with detail lines
backend_api.PUT /api/planillas/{id}?empresa_id=7: PASSED - Updates planilla header and lines
backend_api.GET /api/planillas/{id}?empresa_id=7: PASSED - Returns single planilla with enriched lines
backend_api.GET /api/planillas/resumen/totales?empre: PASSED - Returns summary totals by unidad and linea
backend_api.filters_tipo_estado: PASSED - List endpoint accepts tipo and estado filters
backend_api.resumen_date_filters: PASSED - Resumen endpoint accepts fecha_desde and fecha_hasta

frontend_ui.page_load: PASSED - /planilla page loads with summary cards, table, filters
frontend_ui.summary_cards: PASSED - Shows 4 cards: Planillas count, Total Bruto, Total Neto, Trabajadores
frontend_ui.planillas_table: PASSED - Shows planillas with Periodo, Tipo, Fechas, Trabajadores, Totals, Estado, Actions
frontend_ui.view_modal: PASSED - Shows planilla details with header info, totals, and detail lines table
frontend_ui.create_modal: PASSED - Form with Periodo, Tipo, Fechas, Notas, and dynamic worker lines
frontend_ui.edit_modal: PASSED - Pre-fills existing data, shows 'Actualizar' button
frontend_ui.delete_confirmation: PASSED - Shows confirmation modal with Cancelar/Eliminar buttons
frontend_ui.filters: PASSED - Tipo (6 options) and Estado (5 options) filters work
frontend_ui.sidebar_navigation: PASSED - Planilla section visible, nav link works from other pages

critical_code_review_comments: Database schema has periodo VARCHAR(20) - ensure UI validates max length to prevent 500 errors
The cont_planilla_detalle table schema in database.py differs from actual usage in planilla.py (empleado_id vs trabajador_id columns) - may need schema migration
seed_data_creation: Test planillas created and cleaned up during pytest. Existing planilla id=8 (2026-01-Q2) used for view/edit tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Planilla module fully tested. Backend uses PostgreSQL tables finanzas2.cont_planilla and finanzas2.cont_planilla_detalle. Workers come from produccion.prod_personas_produccion. Unidades internas: 1=Corte, 2=Costura, 3=Acabado, 5=Lazer. Lineas negocio: 26=LN-PD, 27=LN-PO, 28=QP-PD, 29=SIN-CLAS. Null linea_negocio_id = prorated cost.

verified_data_testids.form_inputs: input-periodo, input-tipo, input-fecha-inicio, input-fecha-fin, input-fecha-pago, input-notas
